goal_text: Task 04476: You are looking for a moderately priced restaurant and it should serve european food. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the phone number and postcode.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
